description: Reflects a geometric shape across a line of symmetry to create its mirror image.
utility: Create a mirror image of a shape reflected across a line

arguments.name: line
arguments.description: The line to reflect across (axis of symmetry)

alternates.description: Reflect a point across a line of symmetry
Reflect an entire polygon across a line

examples.scenario: Reflect a point across the x-axis
examples.expression:
A = point(G, -5, 0)
B = point(G, 5, 0)
xAxis = line(G, A, B)
P = point(G, 2, 3)
R = reflect(G, xAxis, P)

examples.scenario: Reflect a triangle across a vertical line
examples.expression:
A = point(G, 0, -5)
B = point(G, 0, 5)
mirror = line(G, A, B)
T = sas(G, 4, 60, 4, point(G, 1, 1))
R = reflect(G, mirror, T)

examples.scenario: Reflect a circle across a diagonal line
examples.expression:
A = point(G, 0, 0)
B = point(G, 5, 5)
L = line(G, A, B)
C = circle(G, 2, point(G, 3, 0))
R = reflect(G, L, C)

examples.scenario: Create a symmetric design by reflecting a polygon
examples.expression:
A = point(G, 0, -5)
B = point(G, 0, 5)
axis = line(G, A, B)
P = polygon(G, point(G, 1, 0), point(G, 3, 2), point(G, 2, 4))
R = reflect(G, axis, P, c(blue))

examples.scenario: Reflect a line segment across another line
examples.expression:
A = point(G, -3, -3)
B = point(G, 3, 3)
mirror = line(G, A, B)
L = line(G, point(G, 1, 0), point(G, 4, 0))
R = reflect(G, mirror, L)
